SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into on this 1st day of October 2023 by and between:

SELLER: Dr. James Tan, NRIC: S7654321B, residing at 12 Fictional Lane, #08-09, Singapore 123456, email: dr.jamestan@fictionmail.sg, phone: +65 9123 4567.

PURCHASER: Tech Ventures Pte Ltd, UEN: 200912345Z, with its registered office at 34 Imaginary Street, #11-01, Singapore 654321, phone: +65 9876 5432.

WHEREAS, the Seller agrees to sell, and the Purchaser agrees to purchase, 10,000 ordinary shares of Innovative Solutions Pte Ltd for the total purchase price of SGD 500,000.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
